name_en: Top-tier replica M24153 Black This Alma BB bag features grained lambskin leather punctuated by glossy diamond studs, cleverly referencing the brand's hard case stitching interior design. The embossed leather handle and detachable, adjustable shoulder strap ensure comfortable carrying. Dimensions: 23.5 × 17.5 × 11.5 cm
